nasb.text: Thus says the Lord God to Tyre, “Shall not the coastlands shake at the sound of your fall when the wounded groan, when the slaughter occurs in your midst?

esv.text: “Thus says the Lord God to Tyre: Will not the coastlands shake at the sound of your fall, when the wounded groan, when slaughter is made in your midst?

cnv.text: “主耶和華對推羅這樣說：‘殺戮在你中間發生，受傷的人都在唉哼的時候，眾海島豈不因你傾倒的聲音而震動嗎？

ccb.text: “主耶和华对泰尔这样说，‘你倾覆的时候，你中间的杀戮声和受伤之人的惨叫声岂不震动沿海地区吗？
